sourcesContent:
import React from 'react'; import { Container, Row, Col, Card, Accordion } from 'react-bootstrap'; const About = () => (

About Us

{/* Mission & Vision */} Our Mission Empowering vulnerable women, especially widows, through sustainable fish cage farming and innovative financial solutions to foster economic independence and promote the Blue Economy along Lake Victoria. Our Vision A thriving community of resilient women leading in sustainable aquaculture and blue economy initiatives, ensuring food security, poverty reduction, and gender equality along Lake Victoria. {/* Objectives */}

Key Objectives

Promote Sustainable Fish Cage Farming Support women in adopting environmentally friendly aquaculture practices to increase fish production and income. Enhance Financial Inclusion Facilitate table banking and microfinance opportunities to empower women financially and foster entrepreneurship. Strengthen Capacity Building Provide training and skills development in aquaculture, business management, and leadership tailored for vulnerable women. Conserve Lake Victoria’s Ecosystem Encourage sustainable practices that protect the lake’s biodiversity and promote environmental stewardship. Foster Community Collaboration Build strong networks among women groups, local authorities, and stakeholders to amplify impact and sustainability. {/* Activities */}

Our Activities

Training Workshops Conduct training on sustainable fish cage farming, environmental conservation, and financial management. Group Formation Form and support women-led fish farming groups with necessary equipment and inputs. Market & Finance Establish table banking schemes, microfinance support, and facilitate market access with value addition. ); export default About;
